subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! Hearken unto the murmur of the waters of inner meanings that flow in the paradise of thy Lord, the All-Merciful. By God, through its murmuring [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا حسن اسمع خریر ماء المعانی الذی جری فی رضوان ربک الرحمن تالله بخریره
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @high station of the true believer, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @nearness and remoteness, @love of God
